name: attorneys
extraction_prompt:
Extract the following from this law firm website. Return JSON only, no other text.

Fields to extract:
- practice_areas: list of practice areas (immigration, personal injury, family law, criminal defense, real estate, corporate, estate planning, etc.)
- languages: languages spoken
- free_consultation: whether they offer free initial consultation (true/false)
- fee_structure: fee type (hourly, contingency, flat fee, etc.)
- hourly_range: hourly rate range if mentioned
- bar_admissions: state bar admissions
- years_experience: years of experience if mentioned
- team_size: number of attorneys
- notable_results: any mentioned case results or settlements
- awards: professional awards or recognitions

If information is not found, use null for that field.
content_templates: Affordable Lawyers in {city}: Options by Practice Area ({year})
